series_metadata.series_description: Contracts concerning the purchase of goods and/or services for the Ohio Attorney General''s Office (AGO) and outside clients including colleges, universities, and state agencies. Records include, but are not limited to, contracts, contract amendments, contract encumbrances, bidding information, complaints to vendor, requests to purchase (RTP) and response, real estate records, licenses, grants, non-disclosure agreements, and service-level agreements preceding development contract ends.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 8 years from end of contract. ; Paper: Retain 8 years from end of contract, unless scanned and saved electronically., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
